problem_summary: The Spring AI project's getting-started documentation was outdated, referencing the 1.0.0-SNAPSHOT version instead of the released 1.0.0 version. This creates confusion for new users trying to follow the official documentation with incorrect version information and potentially unclear repository setup instructions.
key_requirements: Update BOM version reference from 1.0.0-SNAPSHOT to 1.0.0
Ensure Maven Central repository configuration is clearly documented
Maintain backward compatibility in documentation structure
Provide accurate version information for new Spring AI users
Keep documentation aligned with actual release artifacts
design_decisions: Simple version string replacement approach rather than comprehensive documentation overhaul
Focus on minimal changes to reduce risk of introducing errors
Maintain existing documentation structure and format
outstanding_concerns: No verification that 1.0.0 artifacts are actually available in Maven Central
Lack of validation that other documentation sections remain accurate with version change
No confirmation that example code snippets work with 1.0.0 release
solution_approaches: Direct string replacement of version numbers in documentation
Targeted update focusing only on version-specific references
Minimal intervention approach to reduce change risk
complexity_indicators: Documentation-only change with no code impact
stakeholder_feedback: No conversation or review feedback available
No approval or rejection signals present
discussion_themes: No discussion themes identified due to lack of conversation data
quality_assessment: This is a straightforward documentation maintenance task with appropriate scope and minimal risk. The change addresses a specific versioning inconsistency that would impact user experience.
recommendations: Verify that Spring AI 1.0.0 artifacts are actually published and accessible via Maven Central
Review other documentation files for similar version references that may need updating
Consider adding a brief validation step to ensure example configurations work with 1.0.0
Add a simple test or validation script to prevent similar version mismatches in future releases
